metadata.description: Single-plugin marketplace for blog-cover: generate branded blog cover images via 3-concept exploration + unbiased subagent review

plugins.name: blog-cover
plugins.description: Generate branded blog cover images, hero images, and OpenGraph cards. Reads Google Labs DESIGN.md spec (with gstack legacy + tailwind/CSS fallbacks). 3-concept exploration → user picks → unbiased subagent review. Optional --codex flag adds adversarial OpenAI Codex second opinion.
